query: SELECT stepKey, label, body FROM message_templates WHERE flowType = 'review' AND stepKey = 'review_initial';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT stepKey, label, body FROM message_templates WHERE flowType = 'review' AND stepKey = 'review_initial';

rows.label: Initial Feedback Request
